phrases.intent_en: Ask where the guided tours meet
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde es el punto de encuentro?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DON-de es el PON-to de en-KWEN-tro?

likely_response.local: Bajo el arco del patio central.
likely_response.pronunciation: BAH-hoh EHL AHR-koh DEHL pah-TEE-oh thehnt-RAHL
likely_response.translation_en: In the central courtyard, under the arch.

responses.english: In the central courtyard, under the arch.
responses.phonetic: BAH-hoh EHL AHR-koh DEHL pah-TEE-oh thehnt-RAHL
responses.local: Bajo el arco del patio central.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if audio guides are available now
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, TYEH-nen ow-dee-oh-GEE-ahs dee-poh-NEE-bles ah-OH-rah?

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there are some at the ticket counter.

responses.english: Yes, there are some at the ticket counter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Jewish quarter exhibits are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde están las salas judías?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAHN lahs SAH-lahs hoo-DEE-ahs?

likely_response.local: Suba por la escalera de madera, sala 3.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah POHR LAH eh-skah-LEH-rah DEH mah-DEH-rah SAH-lah
likely_response.translation_en: Upper floor, following the green signs.

responses.english: Upper floor, following the green signs.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah POHR LAH eh-skah-LEH-rah DEH mah-DEH-rah SAH-lah
responses.local: Suba por la escalera de madera, sala 3.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to book a private tour
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo reservo una visita privada?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs KÓ-moh reh-SEHR-boh OO-nah bee-SEE-tah pree-BAH-dah

likely_response.translation_en: At reception, ask the person in charge.

responses.english: At reception, ask the person in charge.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿podría indicarme dónde está la taquilla?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAR-meh DOHN-deh es-TAH lah tah-KEE-yah?

likely_response.local: Está justo al entrar, a su derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHSTÁ HOO-stoh AHL ehnt-RAHR AH SOO deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: It is right upon entering, on your right.

responses.english: It is right upon entering, on your right.
responses.phonetic: EHSTÁ HOO-stoh AHL ehnt-RAHR AH SOO deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Está justo al entrar, a su derecha.
